citation: Ashton, M. C., & Lee, K. (2009). The HEXACO-60: A short measure of the major dimensions of personality. Journal of Personality Assessment, 91(4), 340-345.
license: Free for non-profit academic research use
response_scale: 1 = strongly disagree, 2 = disagree, 3 = neutral (neither agree nor disagree), 4 = agree, 5 = strongly agree
scoring_notes: For reverse-keyed items (R), recode responses: 5->1, 4->2, 3->3, 2->4, 1->5. Scale scores are computed as the mean of all (recoded where applicable) items belonging to that scale.

hex1.text: I would be quite bored by a visit to an art gallery.

hex2.text: I plan ahead and organize things, to avoid scrambling at the last minute.

hex3.text: I rarely hold a grudge, even against people who have badly wronged me.

hex4.text: I feel reasonably satisfied with myself overall.

hex5.text: I would feel afraid if I had to travel in bad weather conditions.

hex6.text: I wouldn't use flattery to get a raise or promotion at work, even if I thought it would succeed.

hex7.text: I'm interested in learning about the history and politics of other countries.

hex8.text: I often push myself very hard when trying to achieve a goal.

hex9.text: People sometimes tell me that I am too critical of others.

hex10.text: I rarely express my opinions in group meetings.

hex11.text: I sometimes can't help worrying about little things.

hex12.text: If I knew that I could never get caught, I would be willing to steal a million dollars.

hex13.text: I would enjoy creating a work of art, such as a novel, a song, or a painting.

hex14.text: When working on something, I don't pay much attention to small details.

hex15.text: People sometimes tell me that I'm too stubborn.

hex16.text: I prefer jobs that involve active social interaction to those that involve working alone.

hex17.text: When I suffer from a painful experience, I need someone to make me feel comfortable.

hex18.text: Having a lot of money is not especially important to me.

hex19.text: I think that paying attention to radical ideas is a waste of time.

hex20.text: I make decisions based on the feeling of the moment rather than on careful thought.

hex21.text: People think of me as someone who has a quick temper.

hex22.text: On most days, I feel cheerful and optimistic.

hex23.text: I feel like crying when I see other people crying.

hex24.text: I think that I am entitled to more respect than the average person is.

hex25.text: If I had the opportunity, I would like to attend a classical music concert.

hex26.text: When working, I sometimes have difficulties due to being disorganized.

hex27.text: My attitude toward people who have treated me badly is 'forgive and forget'.

hex28.text: I feel that I am an unpopular person.

hex29.text: When it comes to physical danger, I am very fearful.

hex30.text: If I want something from someone, I will laugh at that person's worst jokes.

hex31.text: I've never really enjoyed looking through an encyclopedia.

hex32.text: I do only the minimum amount of work needed to get by.

hex33.text: I tend to be lenient in judging other people.

hex34.text: In social situations, I'm usually the one who makes the first move.

hex35.text: I worry a lot less than most people do.

hex36.text: I would never accept a bribe, even if it were very large.

hex37.text: People have often told me that I have a good imagination.

hex38.text: I always try to be accurate in my work, even at the expense of time.

hex39.text: I am usually quite flexible in my opinions when people disagree with me.

hex40.text: The first thing that I always do in a new place is to make friends.

hex41.text: I can handle difficult situations without needing emotional support from anyone else.

hex42.text: I would get a lot of pleasure from owning expensive luxury goods.

hex43.text: I like people who have unconventional views.

hex44.text: I make a lot of mistakes because I don't think before I act.

hex45.text: Most people tend to get angry more quickly than I do.

hex46.text: Most people are more upbeat and dynamic than I generally am.

hex47.text: I feel strong emotions when someone close to me is going away for a long time.

hex48.text: I want people to know that I am an important person of high status.

hex49.text: I don't think of myself as the artistic or creative type.

hex50.text: People often call me a perfectionist.

hex51.text: Even when people make a lot of mistakes, I rarely say anything negative.

hex52.text: I sometimes feel that I am a worthless person.

hex53.text: Even in an emergency I wouldn't feel like panicking.

hex54.text: I wouldn't pretend to like someone just to get that person to do favors for me.

hex55.text: I find it boring to discuss philosophy.

hex56.text: I prefer to do whatever comes to mind, rather than stick to a plan.

hex57.text: When people tell me that I'm wrong, my first reaction is to argue with them.

hex58.text: When I'm in a group of people, I'm often the one who speaks on behalf of the group.

hex59.text: I remain unemotional even in situations where most people get very sentimental.

hex60.text: I'd be tempted to use counterfeit money, if I were sure I could get away with it.
